mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in FEDFUNDS increases discount rates applied to equity cash flows and compresses valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the funds-rate trend is positive.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 2.33 as of 2022-09-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month FEDFUNDS changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses above 6%, expected monetary restraint rises and equity risk premia widen, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 295.62 as of 2022-09-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered high-inflation observations have nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or a one-sided return test has p > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS rises rapidly while UNRATE remains below 4%, the Fed has labor-market room to keep tightening, so discount-rate pressure dominates earnings support and produces negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises more than 0.75pp over 3 months while UNRATE is below 4.0%
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available value was 3.7 as of 2022-09-15
regime_hint: tight labor market during monetary tightening
failure_condition: Reject if this joint condition is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals resilient consumer demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest available value was 683291.0 as of 2022-09-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS momentum has a negative mean 5-day forward S&P 500 return in out-of-sample walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp downside break in HOUST signals housing-led demand contraction and weaker future cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses more than 10% below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest available value was 1446.0 as of 2022-09-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST downside breaks are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is high and INDPRO falls over 3 months, the economy enters a stagflationary mix of margin pressure and weaker output, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation is above 6% while INDPRO 3-month change is below 0%
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available value was 104.5464 as of 2022-09-15
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term fails to add predictive power versus separate CPIAUCSL and INDPRO effects, with out-of-sample Rank IC improvement <= 0.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months, labor-market deterioration signals recession risk and weaker earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available value was 3.7 as of 2022-09-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases have nonnegative median 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests across at least 30 triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive quarterly declines in GDPC1 identify broad real-demand contraction, lowering expected earnings and risk appetite, and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 declines in two consecutive quarterly releases
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest available value was 19699.465 as of 2022-09-15
fact:real GDP releases available by 2022-09-15 showed contractions in 2022 Q1 and Q2
regime_hint: technical recession or real-demand contraction regime
failure_condition: Reject if two-quarter GDPC1 contractions are followed by positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns after accounting for data release lags.
